title: Intensely Savory Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and adventurous Irish dish featuring tender lamb, little gem lettuce, and aromatic tadka spices, perfect for a cold winter's night. This high-protein-friendly stew is rich and satisfying.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes in batches until crispy on all sides, then set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the tadka spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the browned lamb, lamb broth, and chopped little gem lettuce to the pot.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
